meta.title: 本站說明
meta.summary: 統計概念的來歷、例子與可重現的圖表。

en.title: About this site
en.summary: How the site is written, how the examples are checked, and why the simulations give the same numbers every time.

p-value.oneLine: 假設虛無為真，得到「像這樣或更極端」的結果的機率。
p-value.example: 八杯茶全挑對，純靠猜的機率是 70 分之 1，約 0.014。這個 0.014 就是 p。

en.oneLine: The probability of a result at least as extreme as the one you got, if the null were true.
en.example: Picking all four milk-first cups by luck alone has probability 1 in 70, about 0.014. That 0.014 is the p value.
